'''ngobakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegecultural|vegecultural]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegecultural|vegecultural]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngobakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngobakithi || ngobakiji || ngobakishi || ngobakiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngobakuthu || ngobakuju || ngobakushu || ngobakuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngobakuthu || ngobakuju || ngobakushu || ngobakuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngobakufthuf || ngobakufjuf || ngobakufshuf || ngobakufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngobakethe || ngobakeje || ngobakeshe || ngobakeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngobakotho || ngobakojo || ngobakosho || ngobakoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngobakotho || ngobakojo || ngobakosho || ngobakoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngobakofthof || ngobakofjof || ngobakofshof || ngobakofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngobakïfthïf || ngobakïfjïf || ngobakïfshïf || ngobakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngobakïfthïf || ngobakïfjïf || ngobakïfshïf || ngobakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngobakïfthïf || ngobakïfjïf || ngobakïfshïf || ngobakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngobakïfthïf || ngobakïfjïf || ngobakïfshïf || ngobakïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngobakæthæ || ngobakæjæ || ngobakæshæ || ngobakækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngobakatha || ngobakaja || ngobakasha || ngobakaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngobakatha || ngobakaja || ngobakasha || ngobakaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngobakafthaf || ngobakafjaf || ngobakafshaf || ngobakafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || ngobakasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || ngobakshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || ngobakroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || ngobakmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || ngobakyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongobaknkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongobaknkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongobaknkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongobaknkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || ngobabakasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || ngobabakshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || ngobabakroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || ngobabakmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || ngobabakyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongobabaknkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongobabaknkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongobabaknkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongobabaknkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || ngebækasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || ngebækshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || ngebækroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || ngebækmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || ngebækyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongebæknkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongebæknkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongebæknkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongebæknkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || ngobfakasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || ngobfakshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || ngobfakroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || ngobfakmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || ngobfakyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongobfaknkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongobfaknkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongobfaknkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongobfaknkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
